title: argyrolobium roseum
intro: Argyrolobium roseum, also known as the pink bushpea, is a small shrub native to South Africa. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Argyrolobium roseum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in capsule form as an herbal supplement.
